title: Harvest Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by arbitrage on liquidity pools

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls deposit() or withdraw() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> deposit() || withdraw() in single tx

red_flags: Unusual price manipulation in liquidity pools
Multiple cycles of deposit and withdraw within a short time frame
monitoring_rules: BLOCK deposit() || withdraw() after FLASHLOAN_BORROW in the same transaction
summary: A hacker exploited a flash loan to manipulate the price of USDT in liquidity pools, allowing them to withdraw more tokens than initially deposited. This attack could have been prevented by blocking deposits and withdrawals immediately following a flash loan.
